texto: I know we're fucked up, alright? I'm impulsive, and hot tempered, and you get under my skin like no one else. You act like you hate me one minute, and then need me the next. When you're around, I don't need booze, or money, or the fighting, or the one-night stands...

texto: His fingers lightly grazed my cheek. "I didn't know you before. When you're not there, I can't concentrate. texto: You’re sorry? I damn near drank myself to death, I could barely get out of bed, I shattered my phone into a million pieces on New Year’s Eve to keep from calling you … and you’re sorry?”I bit my lip and nodded, ashamed. I promise.”He flashed his dimple and shook his head. “I fucking love you.

texto: There is a distinct difference between the ability to create life and the innate need to protect it; to cherish it. The life you've created is the one being you love most in the universe, and that intense love evolves into something that goes far beyond a sense of duty. It is instinct; pure and undeniable. As a direct result, one must neglect all else to preserve it. Even those we have claimed to love before.

texto: They don’t want me. They’re curious why you want me. And anyway, I feel sorry for anyone that thinks they have a chance. texto: I’ve never been so clear about anything in my life. I turned around, made my way to that room you were in, and there you were. Nothing else mattered. I didn’t even know if we would make it out or not, I just wanted to be where you were, whatever that meant. The only thing I’m afraid of is a life without you, Pigeon.

texto: After climbing off his bike, I smacked his shoulder. “Did you forget I was with you?
